[2018-07-26 17:00] jamberine: kinda weird if you're breaching
[2018-07-26 17:00] jamberine: like, if you're breaching does it cancel your breach
[2018-07-26 17:01] jamberine: since breaches happen on your turn
[2018-07-26 17:01] jamberine: or does it just carry over teh small amount of floated damage
[2018-07-26 17:02] olafim (olaf_im): it shouldn't do that but i don't know how to fix it
[2018-07-26 17:05] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): so many rules and restrictions, let your imagination fly in this channel!
[2018-07-26 17:11] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): wouldn't just using all your attack when bought fix it?
[2018-07-26 17:12] darkeisbein: cause it still violates undo rule with stuff like thermite core
[2018-07-26 17:14] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): what's this undo rule i'm hearing about now? the fact the game can't undo from certain states should be a restriction?
[2018-07-26 17:15] darkeisbein: undo shouldn't allow you to reach game states unreachable without undo
[2018-07-26 17:16] darkeisbein: so in this case you could click core then buy this then unclick core
[2018-07-26 17:16] darkeisbein: to reach a state otherwise unreachable
[2018-07-26 17:16] darkeisbein: also there is the problem of order mattering for something where it really shouldn't
[2018-07-26 17:17] darkeisbein: as in if you play this first you can't click thermites
[2018-07-26 17:17] darkeisbein: but if you click thermites first you can then buy this
[2018-07-26 17:19] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): seems like a problem with undo, but I see your point.
[2018-07-26 17:21] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): looking at the situation again, that doesn't seem like a problem.
[2018-07-26 17:21] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): seems more like a feature than a bug
[2018-07-26 17:23] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): Termite core so good
[2018-07-26 17:24] _theavatar (The Avatar): Yeah, I’m not sure that’s really a problem (unlike a resource loop, for example). Just like how pixies could be clicked after purchase to generate attack, thermite could be clicked beforehand to preserve 2 attack

[2018-07-27 04:09] xyotsuba: Hmm actually maybe it doesn’t
[2018-07-27 04:09] xyotsuba: Compared to nitrocybe it’s 1 more hp and 1 less threat
[2018-07-27 04:17] shadourow (Rando): So Tardy is better than nitrocybe, right ?
green is worth 1.33, red 1, 1 threat, without being self countered, would probably be the "2*inflation - 2" if you defend with engi. wait... 1 threat would be worth 0.88 at 1.33 inflation ? Seems a lot !

So Tardy give you 2 soak (which is worth 4 ?) for 2.33 (ratio  : 1.72) while nitro give you 1 soak + 1 threat (2.88)  for 2 (ratio : 1.44)

Do I have something wrong ?

[2018-07-27 04:17] xyotsuba: Well the thing you have wrong is costing red as 1

[2018-07-27 04:18] xyotsuba: You buy cybe in situations when you would otherwise be wasting red

Early game is around 1.3
Midgame is around 1.4
Late game is around 1.5

[2018-07-27 04:22] xyotsuba: The return on investment of the unit at 1.33
[2018-07-27 04:23] shadourow (Rando): ROI seems to be another name for inflation, right ?
[2018-07-27 04:23] shadourow (Rando): As inflation depends on the ROI
[2018-07-27 04:23] xyotsuba: Oh whops I mean the barrier value
[2018-07-27 04:23] xyotsuba: That’s what you are doing right?
[2018-07-27 04:23] shadourow (Rando): Yeah, indeed, but I was just comparinh with nitro
[2018-07-27 04:24] xyotsuba: Do u know what wall is
[2018-07-27 04:24] shadourow (Rando): Even with an low inflation of 1.33, the ROi you should get from a BT 2 unit should be > 1.76 to be good (1.33²)
[2018-07-27 04:24] shadourow (Rando): Tardy isn't, but tardy is a sink
[2018-07-27 04:25] shadourow (Rando): Also, no, I don't know the values
[2018-07-27 04:25] camzace: hey look i made a relatively well balanced unit
[2018-07-27 04:25] shadourow (Rando): I didn't really search about values on Prismata
[2018-07-27 04:25] camzace: and all it took was for it to be incredibly simple
[2018-07-27 04:25] shadourow (Rando): I indeed think that your unit is interesting
[2018-07-27 04:26] shadourow (Rando): Simple design, but nice sink
[2018-07-27 04:26] xyotsuba: Oh that makes sense @Rando
[2018-07-27 04:26] xyotsuba: Yeah it’s not insane like aegis or plexo but it’s way better than floating green
[2018-07-27 04:26] xyotsuba: Probably better than gauss charge right?
[2018-07-27 04:26] shadourow (Rando): And I especially think about high econ thorium
[2018-07-27 04:27] xyotsuba: Is it better than the click ability?
[2018-07-27 04:27] supergreyman (Greyman): Yeah, Tardy is really, really efficient defender....
[2018-07-27 04:27] namington: ROI would be a better term than inflation, but a) inflation is more common and b) inflation is more taken to be a property of the _set_ or _gamestate_ rather than a specific unit
[2018-07-27 04:27] namington: whereas ROI might imply that its talking about x unit
[2018-07-27 04:28] namington: ofc, people still ask "what's drake's inflation" or whatever
[2018-07-27 04:28] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... Gauss charge cost 2.33 and give you 2 in a turn, yup, obviously better than gauss
[2018-07-27 04:28] xyotsuba: Yeah it should be what is drakes ROI at x inflation

--- Thread (1 messages, 2018-08-08) ---
[2018-08-08 08:45] valgrim_the_demon (Rorvul): Mechanically:

You defend against flying damage last, but you can't do so in a way that incompletely damages two units.

4 :Attack: and 2 👼 against 2x Xeno and 2x Engineer has this as valid defending options:

Xeno + 2x Engineer
Engineer + absorb on Xeno (flying breach 2)
2x Engineer + absorb on Xeno (flying breach 2)

Not legal:

Xeno + absorb on Xeno

Not sure (I'd say no, absorb is the last thing you do with your defense phase):

Engineer + absorb on Xeno + Engineer (flying breach 1)

SDR-wise: 0 stamina Rhino doesn't (and shouldn't) count. Wall over Sentry is a grey area (positionally it is SDR-compliant, materially it is SDR-breaking)

Gameplay-/balance-wise: That would be the best reasonable scenario, sets with flying are inherently more complex and bad granularity can lead to flying breaches (poor :Tarsier:'s)

I probably shouldn't have valued flying damage more than Apollo snipe.
